title: Irish Hearts
writer: Darryl F. Zanuck, C. Graham Baker, Bess Meredyth
actors: May McAvoy, Jason Robards Sr., Warner Richmond
plot: Sheila, a feisty Irish girl, loves Emmett, a somewhat shady Irish boy. When Emmett goes to America, Sheila and her father follow and join him. However, when he loses his job, Sheila is forced to get a job in a cheap restaurant. Th...
